verses.1: Thus the Lord GOD showed me: behold, a basket of summer fruit.
verses.2: He said, “Amos, what do you see?”
verses.3: The songs of the temple will be wailing in that day,” says the Lord GOD.
verses.4: Hear this, you who desire to swallow up the needy,
verses.5: saying, ‘When will the new moon be gone, that we may sell grain?
verses.6: that we may buy the poor for silver,
verses.7: The LORD has sworn by the pride of Jacob,
verses.8: Won’t the land tremble for this,
verses.9: It will happen in that day,” says the Lord GOD,
verses.10: I will turn your feasts into mourning,
verses.11: Behold, the days come,” says the Lord GOD,
verses.12: They will wander from sea to sea,
verses.13: In that day the beautiful virgins
verses.14: Those who swear by the sin of Samaria,
